reasoning: Your primary limiter is lactate clearance and aerobic base, which was evident from the power drop-off on longer durations. This workout leverages Emigration Canyon's terrain to simulate the key segment of the Alpine Loop. Building fatigue resistance will help you maintain a higher average wattage on sustained climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x15 min blocks, 2 min over 242W, 3 min under 218W, continuing for each block

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
